rationale: Iteration 003 wins all 4 judged evals against current best (iter-001). Unanimous wins on eval-002 (Paris) and eval-009 (DC) — the navigationHelpButton fix eliminated the tooltip that caused iter-001's eval-002 regression. Eval-003 and eval-010 won by majority (1 win + 2 ties each). Zero regressions. Zero critical eval losses. The only change from iter-001 was adding navigationHelpButton: false and navigationInstructionsInitiallyVisible: false — a minimal, targeted fix that resolved a known issue without introducing new risk.

eval-003.note: One judge noticed cleaner UI in iter-003

eval-010.note: One judge noted marginal UI improvement

hypotheses_validated.H1_navigation_tooltip: FULLY VALIDATED. All judges consistently preferred the version without the navigation help tooltip. Unanimous wins on evals where the tooltip was most visible.

iteration_history.changes: nav tooltip fix on top of iter-001
